steps.t: Faeron has asked for you to search for the Halls of Black Lore. They are somewhere in the Circle of Madness in Minas Morgul. You should find the Halls…
Faeron and the rest of the Rangers have moved to the Halls of Black Lore. You should talk to Faeron.
Rhadrog has returned to Barad Elenath, the Star-gazers' Spire. You should talk to Rhadrog.
